operations.ordering: effectiveCreatedAt DESC with source-unspecified tie order
operations.scope_semantics: requested organization or space selects only the placement/folder decoration branch; every live actor-owned video in the active tenant remains in the result
operations.metadata_semantics: lossless nullable JSON including customCreatedAt; effectiveCreatedAt is internal ordering state and is not emitted
operations.count_semantics: distinct text comments and distinct emoji reactions
operations.upload_semantics: a video-upload row exists and isScreenshot is false

operations.failure: missing session, active tenant, or a two-code-unit query returns []; database/storage failures stay redacted and unavailable
operations.normalization: ECMAScript trim, whitespace collapse, UTF-16 slice(0,80), LIKE escape !/%/_, minimum two UTF-16 code units
operations.ordering: name prefix rank ASC, effectiveCreatedAt DESC, LIMIT 8 with source-unspecified tie order
operations.visibility: active organization owner/member plus actor-owned, organization-shared, or creator/public/member space video
operations.duration_semantics: nullable source floating-point seconds, never a lossy integer-millisecond round trip

authorization_closure.source_residual: getUserVideos filters by owner and organization tombstone only, so a caller-selected scope can return the actor's videos from unrelated tenants; searchDashboardVideos already applies active-tenant and visibility predicates
authorization_closure.frame_correction: the host-only actor and live active organization are reasserted before each query, getUserVideos restricts every returned video to that tenant, and requested spaces require creator/public/member access
authorization_closure.non_disclosure: foreign, stale, missing, duplicate, or corrupt scope/alias authority returns no video projection
